title: FinnGen Analysis Gallery
description: Browse all available FinnGen GWAS analyses across disease endpoints. The gallery provides an overview of analyzed phenotypes, case counts, and top association signals, enabling comparison across conditions.
tips: Filter the gallery by disease category (cardiovascular, metabolic, psychiatric, etc.) to find relevant endpoints.
Case counts are shown for each endpoint — endpoints with fewer than 200 cases may have limited statistical power.
Click any endpoint card to open the full GWAS analysis including Manhattan plot and top hits.
Use the search bar to find endpoints by ICD code, phenotype name, or FinnGen endpoint identifier.
The significance column shows the most significant p-value observed for each endpoint as a quick overview of genetic association strength.
